description_long: This induction cooker features a sleek, rectangular black glass-ceramic surface with a minimalist design. The cooktop is equipped with four circular heating zones, each marked by subtle rings, arranged in a single row near the front edge. Below the heating zones, there are four round, metallic control knobs or touch-sensitive buttons, evenly spaced and slightly raised for tactile feedback. The surface is highly reflective, suggesting a smooth, glossy finish typical of modern induction appliances. No digital display or brand logo is visible, and the overall form is low-profile and compact. The sides and back are plain, with no visible vents, handles, or power cord.
description: A sleek, black induction cooker with four circular heating zones and four metallic control buttons on a glossy, flat surface. The design is minimalist, with no visible branding or digital display.
description_view_0: Front view showing four metallic control buttons aligned below the four heating zones on a glossy black surface.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the slim profile and the side alignment of the control buttons.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, uninterrupted black surface with no visible controls or features.
description_view_3: Right-side view mirroring the left, showing the slim profile and the side alignment of the control buttons.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Four round metallic control buttons are evenly spaced in a single row along the front edge of the cooktop, directly below the four heating zones. No labels, icons, or indicator lights are visible.
